concerns.text: FR-007 defines the sensitivity analysis sweep set as '{small, moderate, large}' which are qualitative descriptors, whereas SC-004 explicitly requires quantitative thresholds '(0.01, 0.05, 0.1)'. This creates a terminology mismatch and ambiguity in the testable set of values for the sensitivity analysis.

The Edge Cases section describes a fallback mechanism for 'invalid warp vectors' (identity warp or exclusion). However, FR-003 mandates the system 'MUST' warp latent features using pre-computed flow fields without mentioning a fallback path. The functional requirement should explicitly include the handling of invalid flow data to ensure the system does not crash or produce undefined behavior when the edge case occurs.
